/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libiceoryx_posh_gateway.so -o libiceoryx_posh_gateway.so CMakeFiles/iceoryx_posh_gateway.dir/source/gateway/gateway_base.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/iceoryx_posh:/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib: libiceoryx_posh.so /root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib/libiceoryx_hoofs.so /root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib/libiceoryx_platform.so -lrt -lpthread
